ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country related to the statistics */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region related to the statistics */,
  "current_deaths" INTEGER /* Current number of deaths */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "total_deaths_lower" INTEGER /* Lower estimate of total deaths */,
  "total_deaths_upper" INTEGER /* Upper estimate of total deaths */,
  "peak_date" TEXT /* Date of peak deaths */,
  "peak_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths at peak date */,
  "peak_over_current_deaths_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of peak deaths over current deaths */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of deaths */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of deaths */,
  "intervention_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of health interventions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., WHO, CDC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source providing the entry */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated statistic */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the entry */,
  "entry_value" INTEGER /* Value of the entry (e.g., number of deaths) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES death_statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic related to historical data */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "current_deaths" INTEGER /* Current deaths reported */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths recorded */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of deaths */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES death_statistics ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data included in the report in JSON format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the validation process */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role in JSON format */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit data */,
  "can_generate_notifications" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can generate notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
